plugins.name: nvidia-prompt
plugins.description: NVIDIA AI Chat is a command-line tool that lets you chat with advanced AI models through NVIDIA's API. Simply type your question and get an intelligent response powered by GLM models.

plugins.name: rag-local
plugins.description: Simple RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system using Node.js, LanceDB, NVIDIA embeddings, and MCP for OpenCode integration.

plugins.name: sql-runner
plugins.description: MCP server that connects to SQL databases and executes queries from natural language prompts via OpenCode CLI.
